Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start &Update.Title = 'Editar' &Delete.Title = 'Deletar' &CopyRecord.Title = 'Copiar' retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWTIPOLANCAMENTO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &LctAtuPro1 = nullvalue(&LctAtuPro1) &LctAtuEst1 = nullvalue(&LctAtuEst1) &LctAtuSal1 = nullvalue(&LctAtuSal1) &LctGerFin1 = nullvalue(&LctGerFin1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &LctAtuPro2 = nullvalue(&LctAtuPro2) &LctAtuEst2 = nullvalue(&LctAtuEst2) &LctAtuSal2 = nullvalue(&LctAtuSal2) &LctGerFin2 = nullvalue(&LctGerFin2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &LctAtuPro3 = nullvalue(&LctAtuPro3) &LctAtuEst3 = nullvalue(&LctAtuEst3) &LctAtuSal3 = nullvalue(&LctAtuSal3) &LctGerFin3 = nullvalue(&LctGerFin3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &LctTip = nullvalue(&LctTip) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Cadastro de Tipo Lançamento' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() &Session.Remove(!'TipoLancamentoCopyRecord') GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' &Update.Link = TipoLancamento.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, LctCod) &Delete = !'' &Delete.Link = TipoLancamento.Link(TrnMode.Delete, EmpCod, LctCod) &CopyRecord = !'' &asdasd.Clear() &asdasd.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &asdasd.AddItem(1, 'Log.Alteração') &asdasd.AddItem(2, 'Configurações SPED') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &CopyRecord.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TipoLancamentoCopyRecord.Load(EmpCod, LctCod) &Session.Set(!'TipoLancamentoCopyRecord', &TipoLancamentoCopyRecord.ToXml()) TipoLancamento.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(LctCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &asdasd.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &asdasd = 1 Do 'Do LogAlteracao' Case &asdasd = 2 Do 'Do UserAction1' EndCase &asdasd = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event LogAlteracao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wwLogRegistrosIndividual.Create(&LogErpRegKey, 'TIPOLANCAMENTO') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TipoLancamento.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(LctCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctNom1.Visible = False &LctAtuPro1.Visible = False &LctAtuEst1.Visible = False &LctAtuSal1.Visible = False &LctGerFin1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTNOM' &LctNom1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTATUPRO' &LctAtuPro1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTATUEST' &LctAtuEst1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTATUSAL' &LctAtuSal1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTGERFIN' &LctGerFin1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctNom2.Visible = False &LctAtuPro2.Visible = False &LctAtuEst2.Visible = False &LctAtuSal2.Visible = False &LctGerFin2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTNOM' &LctNom2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTATUPRO' &LctAtuPro2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTATUEST' &LctAtuEst2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTATUSAL' &LctAtuSal2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTGERFIN' &LctGerFin2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctNom3.Visible = False &LctAtuPro3.Visible = False &LctAtuEst3.Visible = False &LctAtuSal3.Visible = False &LctGerFin3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTNOM' &LctNom3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTATUPRO' &LctAtuPro3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTATUEST' &LctAtuEst3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTATUSAL' &LctAtuSal3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTGERFIN' &LctGerFin3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 0 &LctNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 0 &LctNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do LogAlteracao' &LogErpRegKey = trim(str(LctCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LogAlteracao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do UserAction1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWFilialTipoLancamentoSped.Call(LctCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTCOD" &LctCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTTIP" &LctTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &LctNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTATUPRO' &LctAtuPro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTATUEST' &LctAtuEst1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTATUSAL' &LctAtuSal1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTGERFIN' &LctGerFin1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTCOD", "", not &LctCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTTIP", "", not &LctTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctTip, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTNOM' AND not &LctNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctNom1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTATUPRO' AND not &LctAtuPro1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctAtuPro1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTATUEST' AND not &LctAtuEst1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctAtuEst1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTATUSAL' AND not &LctAtuSal1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctAtuSal1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTGERFIN' AND not &LctGerFin1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctGerFin1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTNOM' AND not &LctNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctNom2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTATUPRO' AND not &LctAtuPro2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctAtuPro2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTATUEST' AND not &LctAtuEst2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctAtuEst2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTATUSAL' AND not &LctAtuSal2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctAtuSal2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTGERFIN' AND not &LctGerFin2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctGerFin2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTNOM' AND not &LctNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctNom3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTATUPRO' AND not &LctAtuPro3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctAtuPro3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTATUEST' AND not &LctAtuEst3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctAtuEst3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTATUSAL' AND not &LctAtuSal3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctAtuSal3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTGERFIN' AND not &LctGerFin3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctGerFin3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"TipoLancamento" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
